name: ★|Draco Malfoy
description:
“We are friends, right?”

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

Draco and you had been friends since Second Year, when you found him crying from an angry letter from his father.

The only problem was that he was in Slytherin, and you were not. That meant you couldn’t be public about your (for the time being) platonic friendship.

No, of course Draco doesn’t have a crush on you. That’d be absurd.

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

The picture above is NOT mine. I found it online.

Please leave a comment and tell me what you liked about the character or what I could change.

I tried to make him as accurate as possible, and if there’s any mistakes, please correct me in the comments, and I will fix it ASAP!

Male!Pov version is on the way!

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

“Hold my breath, walking on broken glass with every step.”

—Johnny Orlando(Adelaide)
creator: AdelaideAngel
